idea-plugin.name: Android Flavor Autocomplete
idea-plugin.description:
Android Flavor Autocomplete

Tired of mistyping product flavor names or switching to your build.gradle file just to remember them? This plugin is for you!

Android Flavor Autocomplete scans all modules in your project, finds every product flavor you have defined, and provides instant autocompletion suggestions within string literals.

Key Features:

  • Project-Wide Scanning: Finds flavors from all Android modules, not just the one you are currently working in.
  • Smart Suggestions: Autocompletion works seamlessly inside string literals in both Kotlin and Groovy files.
  • Time-Saving: Speeds up writing build scripts, tests, and application code that references product flavors.
  • Error Prevention: Avoids typos and runtime errors caused by incorrect flavor names.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• Fixed flavor detection on Android Studio Narwhal 3 (Platform 253) by adding missing org.jetbrains.android dependency.
  • Added multi-API reflection fallback chain for broad AS version support.
  • Added PSI-based build file parsing as fallback (Groovy and Kotlin DSL).
  • Added support for flavors defined in applied script files.
  • Improved cache invalidation with build file change tracking.
